metadata.title: MCS - Multilingual Communication System
metadata.description: Break language barriers instantly. Enable seamless collaboration between Japan, the Philippines, and global teams through a secure, workspace-based multilingual communication platform.

hero.heading: Break Language Barriers.
hero.subheading: Enable seamless multilingual communication with real-time translation for teams around the world.

challenge.label: The Problem
challenge.heading: Cross-Border Communication Is Broken
challenge.subheading: Companies operating between Japan and the Philippines face daily friction from fragmented tools and manual translation workflows.

cost.title: High Operational Costs
cost.description: Heavy reliance on interpreters and bilingual staffing inflates budgets significantly.

delays.title: Delayed Responses
delays.description: Translation bottlenecks slow down every interaction between multilingual teams.

miscommunication.title: Miscommunication Risk
miscommunication.description: Nuances lost in translation directly impact service quality and client relationships.

security.title: Security Fragmentation
security.description: Using multiple external tools creates data leakage risks and compliance gaps.

advantage.label: The Solution
advantage.heading: The MCS Advantage
advantage.description: MCS enables real-time multilingual communication within secure, isolated workspaces. Teams communicate in their preferred language while the system translates instantly within structured channels and groups — no external tools, no delays, no data exposure.

realtime.title: Real-Time Multilingual Messaging
realtime.description: Instantly translate conversations across English, Japanese, and Chinese within channels, groups, or individual discussions. Every message is delivered in each participant's language.

workspace.title: Workspace-Based Data Isolation
workspace.description: Each organization operates within a dedicated workspace ensuring confidentiality and preventing cross-client data exposure.

control.title: Structured Communication Control
control.description: Manage conversations through controlled channels and segmented groups with role-based access permissions.

responsive.title: Responsive Web & Mobile Access
responsive.description: Optimized interface for distributed teams working across multiple locations and devices.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
security.description: Encrypted communication, permission management, and secure cloud infrastructure built for enterprise environments.

reduceCost.title: Reduce Operational Cost
reduceCost.description: Minimize reliance on manual translation and additional bilingual staffing overhead.

improveSpeed.title: Improve Response Speed
improveSpeed.description: Enable direct communication without waiting for interpretation layers or handoffs.

enhanceQuality.title: Enhance Service Quality
enhanceQuality.description: Maintain consistency and accuracy in messaging across regions and languages.

collaboration.title: Strengthen Cross-Border Collaboration
collaboration.description: Align headquarters and overseas teams effortlessly with seamless, real-time communication and collaboration.

confidentiality.title: Protect Client Confidentiality
confidentiality.description: Dedicated workspaces ensure secure, isolated information handling with enterprise-grade access controls.

useCase.label: In Practice
useCase.heading: Japan–Philippines Operational Collaboration
useCase.description: A Japanese headquarters managing a customer support team in the Philippines uses MCS to eliminate language-driven delays entirely.

steps.step2: Philippine team members respond in English
steps.step3: Messages are translated in real time within the same workspace
steps.step4: Channels separate operations, QA, and client discussions
steps.step5: Confidential data remains isolated within the company workspace

foundingPartner.label: Limited Opportunity
foundingPartner.heading: Become a Founding Partner of Chateaze
foundingPartner.description: We are inviting a limited number of organizations to participate in the MCS Founding Partner Program and gain early access to our multilingual communication platform designed for cross-border collaboration.

benefits.earlyAccess: Early access to the Chateaze platform
benefits.influence: Opportunity to influence future product development

foundingPartner.limitedNotice: Limited to the first 10 qualified companies.
foundingPartner.applyNotice: Apply now to secure your spot.

cta.heading: Transform Your Cross-Border Communication
cta.description: Empower your teams to collaborate globally without language barriers. Discover how MCS can support your organization.
